calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Cathedral Hill Tower Condominium'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jan-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joshua Johnson, Esq. of Chapman and Intrieri, T:510.864.3600, for plaintiff/moving party;
Lee Done U, defendant appearing on his own behalf;
Song Ae Park, Korean interpreter for defendant Lee Done U.

Prior to the hearing, Miss Song Ae Park was sworn.

RULING: Defendant Lee Done U does not oppose the tentative ruling and has no objection to the Court executing the Judgment. Therefore, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF CATHEDRAL HILL TOWER CONDOMINIUM'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement as follows: GRANTED. No opposition was filed.

ORDER and JUDGMENT SIGNED. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

MOTION To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jan-05-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Done U Lee, T:415.515.4891, defendant appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: Defendant did not give notice that he will appear to contest the tentative ruling. However, in order to give the defendant an opportunity to be heard, the Court continued the hearing on PLAINTIFF CATHEDRAL HILL TOWER CONDOMINIUM'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement to January 12, 2018 at 9:30 am. The Court also instructed this clerk to provide notice to plaintiff's counsel of the continued hearing date. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
